title: Quick check: What a robot is

choices.text: Autonomous or semi-autonomous machine that senses environment, processes info, and acts. Three pillars: sense (sensors), think (controllers), act (actuators). Differs from pure AI (LLMs, chess engines) by having physical body.

Manipulation (picking arbitrary objects), locomotion (robust walking on varied terrain), generalization (unseen environments), safety (around humans). Active research; humanoid push from Tesla/Figure/Boston Dynamics tackling these now.
